  as={"h1"}

  children={"Register for program"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/programs/{program_id}/promoters/{promoter_id}/register"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Registers a promoter to participate in a program, optionally within a circle.
